creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-06-02 21:43:10 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/bogofilter      Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/bogofilter/files patch-fixqp 
  Removed files:
    mail/bogofilter/files patch-src-tests-tframe 
  Log:
  Update to late May SVN snapshot to
  - Fix quoted-printable decoding in the presence of excess CR characters
    (continuation lines)
  - Fix parallel build by removing two files that were accidentally shipped
  
  PR:             135149
  Submitted by:   Matthias Andree <matthias.andree@gmx.de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.92      +8 -6      ports/mail/bogofilter/Makefile
  1.1       +305 -0    ports/mail/bogofilter/files/patch-fixqp (new)
  1.2       +0 -8      ports/mail/bogofilter/files/patch-src-tests-tframe (dead)
